Gain Calculated Strike if you haven't hit an enemy recently.

name: Ring of Siphon Strike
desc:
Activate on Crouch:
Your next Power Attack will siphon 20 to 40 Stamina.

  15 seconds Cooldown

desc:
Movement Speed effects from Shock are inverted.
+15% Attack Speed.

name: Ring of Panic
desc: Gain 5% Movement Speed for every 10% Health missing.

name: Ring of Mutation
desc: Every 1% Infection grants +1% Attack Speed, up to 25%.

name: Ring of Vulnerability

Hiting an enemy applies them with Vulnerability for 6 seconds.
Vulnerability reduces Damage Mitigation by 10%.

name: Ring of Stealth
desc:
Activates Full Stealth when you crouch, becoming completely hidden from enemies (Except players).
  4 seconds Duration
  12 seconds Cooldown

name: Ring of Battle (Damage)
desc:
Killing an enemy grants +10% Entity Damage for 12 seconds.
Stacks 4 times.

name: Ring of Battle (Attack Speed)
desc:
Killing an enemy grants +4% Attack Speed for 12 seconds.
Stacks 4 times.

name: Ring of Battle (Protection)
desc:
Killing an enemy grants +1% Damage Mitigation for 12 seconds.
Stacks 4 times.

name: Ring of Replenishment
desc: Restores 5 Stamina and 1 Health every 10 seconds.

name: Ring of Plunder
desc: Killing an enemy has a 5% chance to loot some cash.

name: Ring of Bounty Hunting
desc: Occasionally gain a Bounty. Bounty kills grant Dukes (Casino Coins).

name: Ring of Elementalist
desc:
While wielding a Melee or Archery weapon:
  8% Chance to Shock on hit.
  8% Chance to Ignite on hit.
  8% Chance to Freeze on hit.
  8% Chance to Quake on hit.

name: Ring of Quake
desc:
While wielding a Sledgehammer or Club:
15% chance on hit to knockdown nearby enemies.

name: Ring of Combat Mending
desc:
When using Medical Bandage or Medical Kit, gain bonuses for 8 seconds:
  +20% Entity Damage
  +15% Attack Speed
  +10% Movement Speed

name: Ring of Caustic Shot
desc:
Your Archery weapons gain Caustic Arrows.
Caustic Arrows apply stacking Poison on hit.
Poison stacks up to 10 times, and lasts 8 seconds.

name: Ring of Blunthead Shot
desc:
Your Archery weapons gain Blunthead Arrows.
Blunthead Arrows have a 15% chance to knockdown enemies on hit.

name: Ring of Treasure Bounty
desc:
+5 Loot Stage on kill. Non-Stackable.
Lasts 12 Seconds.
Refresh on Kill.

name: Ring of Golden Grid
desc:
+1 Loot Stage on kill, up to 30.
Lasts 12 Seconds.
Refresh on Kill.

name: Ring of Wounding
desc: Melee and Archery hits have a 20% chance to apply Open Wounds. Open Wounds deals moderate damage over time, is not stackable, and lasts for 8 seconds.

name: Ring of Poison
desc: Melee and Archery hits have a 35% chance to apply Poison. This Poison deals low damage over time, can stack up to 5, and lasts for 16 seconds.

name: Ring of Jousting
desc:
+10% Attack Speed with Spears.
+25% Entity Damage with Spears.
Spear attacks grants high Movement Speed for 2 seconds.
Effect has an 8 second cooldown.

name: Ring of Barricade
desc:
When hit, +20% Damage Mitigation for 4 seconds.
20 seconds Cooldown.

name: Ring of Time Crunch
desc:
Activate on Crouch: +40% Attack Speed and +20% Movement Speed for 4 seconds.
20 seconds Cooldown.

name: Ring of Fragile Fragment

30 seconds Cooldown.

name: Ring of Surging Life
desc:
When below 25% Health, immediately heals 25 Health.
30 seconds Cooldown.

name: Ring of Surging Stamina
desc:
When below 25% Stamina, immediately recovers 25 Stamina.
30 seconds Cooldown.

name: Ring of Slaughter
desc:
Melee and Archery hits grant a Slaughter Charge.
+40% Attack Speed per Slaughter Charge.
Slaughter Charges resets after the 2nd charge.

name: Ring of Self Damnation
desc:
For each Debuff (up to 10) on you, gain:
+6% Entity Damage, Attack Speed, and Movement Speed.

name: Ring of Trauma
desc:
Melee and Archery apply Trauma on hit: 
-5% Damage Mitigation 
-15% Movement Speed 
-10% Attack Speed 
-20% Entity Damage

name: Ring of Shadow Stitch
desc:
When using First Aid at Night, gain an additional healing effect for 8 seconds.
Bandage: 1 Health per second.
First Aid Bandage: 2 Health per second.
First Aid Kit: 3 Health per second.

+40 Health and Stamina

name: Ring of Cursing Flame
